_provenance.notes: Pinned reference team set for the 2026 WNBA season used by ALL synthetic fixtures so they stay mutually consistent. Franchise IDs for the 12 legacy teams are the well-known stats-platform team IDs; Golden State (2025 expansion), Toronto and Portland (2026 expansion) IDs are PLACEHOLDERS pending live verification via the live-smoke workflow. Never treat this file as authoritative in production - the expected-team set is resolved dynamically from the official source.
